message:
fix(serve): harden memory daemon lifecycle and store copy semantics

Memory daemon state machine:
- Add currentMemoryDaemonInfo() that respects transitional states
  (Starting, Stopping) instead of always re-probing, preventing races
  where a just-started daemon is immediately reported as stopped
- Move daemon start goroutine launch after the DaemonStateStarting store
  write so immediate /daemon/status checks see the transitional state
- Add port-matching validation in startMemoryDaemonAsync to prevent
  adopting a foreign cm daemon running on a different port

Store safety:
- Add cloneMemoryDaemonInfo() for defensive copy semantics in GetDaemonInfo
  and SetDaemonInfo, preventing callers from mutating the canonical store
  entry through the returned pointer

Tests:
- TestHandleMemoryDaemonStatus_ReportsStartingState verifies the
  transitional state is visible through the REST endpoint
- TestStartMemoryDaemonAsync_DoesNotAdoptDifferentDaemonPort verifies
  port mismatch detection
- TestMemoryStore_GetDaemonInfoReturnsCopy proves mutation isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
